Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2078 0 0}Oh, I heard this is where you're supposed to pray to the "god of studies" or something...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, you can pray later. Sanada-san's prolly waiting for us already.[n]{f 1 1}
